title: Surface required approval handoffs in Tickflow run records
description: When a worktree task is accepted and merged, tk close may route ticks with requires=approval/review/content into awaiting state. Update the run record to handoff so the dashboard shows human approvals after successful merge.
acceptance_criteria: Run record updates to handoff when post-close tick has awaiting set; go test ./... passes
closed_reason: Updated worktree merge path to mark run record handoff when post-close tick is awaiting approval/review/content; verified go test ./...
